_comment: NPC: Wang Qingyue (王青叶). Canon ID: N94. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Qingyue

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Cousin Wang Lin, the ancestral hall needs sweeping before the test ceremony. Would you help?
Our family has lived in this village for five generations. We may be poor, but we have our dignity.
I heard the cultivators can fly. Can you imagine? Looking down at our little village from the clouds...
